title: util-linux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.40.2-13]
- lscpu: update table with ARM IDs

[2.40.2-12]
- coresched: backport new tool to RHEL-10

[2.40.2-11]
- agetty: fix stdin conversion to tty name
full_text:
[2.40.2-13]
- lscpu: update table with ARM IDs

[2.40.2-12]
- coresched: backport new tool to RHEL-10

[2.40.2-11]
- agetty: fix stdin conversion to tty name
